title: valeriana calycina
intro: Valeriana calycina, also known as the fragrant valerian, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America, belonging to the family Valerianaceae. The medicinal properties of Valeriana calycina lie in its roots, which contain valerenic acid and other compounds that have sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as reduced muscle spasms and improved sleep quality. Valeriana calycina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
